title: Smoother, Faster, and More Reliable
description: This release brings major performance upgrades and stability improvements across the board. We've supercharged message loading speeds, polished the Portal UI with better animations and keyboard shortcuts, and made WhatsApp integration more reliable with smart auto-reconnection. Plus, we've squashed dozens of bugs to make RPLY feel snappier than ever.
features: Lightning-fast message loading with improved conversation history performance
Enhanced Portal UI with better keyboard shortcuts (Esc, Return) and smoother send animations
WhatsApp auto-reconnection that intelligently handles network issues
New multi-reply interface lets you respond to multiple messages at once
Arrow key navigation in Portal grid view for faster browsing
Contact trends and statistics views with beautiful friend charts and person highlighting
Improved onboarding experience with new welcome screens and reliability upgrades
Group chat support for WhatsApp via Accessibility API
Per-contact and global formatting preferences for personalized replies
Proactive calendar event detection with better date parsing
fixes: Fixed code signing issues that could break the app for users with special characters in their names
Resolved conversation history sometimes appearing empty
Fixed search button not working due to layout issues
Prevented stale UI callbacks from truncating streaming replies
Fixed action buttons and reply section being invisible in expanded Portal view
Resolved app becoming unresponsive for extended periods
Fixed WhatsApp messages not being received and dismissed conversations staying hidden
Improved streaming reply text updates to prevent UI jitter
Fixed group chats not loading in initial data fetch
Resolved fatal errors on desktop Macs related to battery monitoring
Fixed RPLY icon randomly disappearing from menu bar
Prevented crashes when scrolling in Portal UI
Fixed WhatsApp service crashes during onboarding and decryption errors
Improved analytics reliability for tracking user engagement
